message:
Running command: WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== All nl.v files in the run (with inout amuxbus count) ==="
find "$WRAPPER_RUN" -name "*.nl.v" | while read f; do
  COUNT=$(grep -c "^  inout.*amuxbus" "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  echo "$COUNT amuxbus_inouts | $f"
done | sort

echo ""
echo "=== Patch ALL nl.v files with amuxbus inout declarations ==="
find "$WRAPPER_RUN" -name "*.nl.v" | while read f; do
  COUNT=$(grep -c "^  inout.*amuxbus" "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  if [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "Patching $f ($COUNT amuxbus inout lines)..."
    python3 - << PYEOF
import re

nl_file = "$f"

with open("/tmp/missing_ports.txt") as fp:
    missing = set(fp.read().strip().split('\n'))

with open(nl_file) as fp:
    content = fp.read()

orig_count = len(re.findall(r'\binout\s+\w+amuxbus\w*\s*;', content))
changes = 0
for port in missing:
    pattern = rf'\binout\s+{re.escape(port)}\s*;'
    replacement = f'// inout {port}; // removed: analog mux bus signal'
    new_content, n = re.subn(pattern, replacement, content)
    if n > 0:
        content = new_content
        changes += n

# Also remove from module port list
def remove_from_port_list(content, missing):
    def repl(m):
        port_list = m.group(1)
        ports = [p.strip() for p in port_list.split(',')]
        filtered = [p for p in ports if p not in missing]
        return 'module mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper (' + ', '.join(filtered) + ')'
    pattern = r'module mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper\s*\(([^)]+)\)'
    return re.sub(pattern, repl, content, flags=re.DOTALL)

content = remove_from_port_list(content, missing)

with open(nl_file, 'w') as fp:
    fp.write(content)
print(f"  Done: {changes} changes")
PYEOF
  else
    echo "Already clean: $f"
  fi
done

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

    python3 - << PYEOF

for port in missing:

    if n > 0:

        return 'module mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper (' + ', '.join(filtered) + ')'
    pattern = r'module mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper\s*\(([^)]+)\)'

content = remove_from_port_list(content, missing)

print(f"  Done: {changes} changes")

    echo "Already clean: $f"
  fi
done
